message:
feat(fleet): implement SshExecutor for shared SSH infrastructure (bd-3uqs)

Extract and generalize SSH command execution from executor.rs into a
reusable SshExecutor struct. This provides structured error handling,
configurable timeouts, and comprehensive tracing for all fleet SSH
operations including deploy, rollback, preflight, and status queries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
